availability_text: Only 7 left in stock (more on the way).
features: PORTABLE CHARGER - Never be caught with a dead battery again, keep your mobile devices and smartphones powered up with the Groov-e Power Bank 10000mAh portable charger with rapid charging, and stay connected no matter where you are

FAST CHARGE POWER BANK - This phone power bank features fast charging technology letting you juice up your iPhone or Android faster than with a standard portable phone charger, the 10000mAh capacity allows for 4x full charges of your smartphone device

COMPACT DESIGN - The Groov-e charging bank skips the overly bulky design of most mobile phone portable power banks and opts for a more compact shape that is easy to slip into your pocket or bag for quick storage and convenient charging while you travel

3 CHARGING PORTS - The power pack has 3x charging ports for you to use when charging your device which include 2x USB-A ports and 1x USB-C output; the rechargeable power bank features 1x USB-C and 1x Micro-USB input for recharging
PRE-CHARGED & READY TO USE - For your convenience our power banks come pre-charged and ready to use straight out of the box, letting you avoid the hassle of that first charge
